improvement: Bound the exact-commit hostname evidence gate to the project-specific Cloudflare Pages hostname classifier before any DNS or HTTP evidence collection can run.
acceptance_contract: Deployment URL must be canonical HTTPS origin syntax.
Hostname must be the exact project production hostname, a project-bound preview hostname, or an explicitly allowlisted exact custom host.
Rejected hostname policy must stop before network evidence construction.
Accepted hostname policy must still pass exact hostname and source-commit packet bindings.
limits: Committed tests are not claimed passing because no workflow run was returned for the test commit.
No DNS resolution, HTTP reachability, Cloudflare account ownership, deployment ID, or served commit was established.
This evidence does not establish scientific truth, diagnosis, treatment, payment, or conversion authorization.

rollback.method: revert in reverse order without deleting history
